name: Encryption Compliance Audit
description: Audits encryption compliance across the organization by verifying encryption at rest and in transit for all systems handling sensitive data. Scans database configurations, storage volumes, API endpoints, and certificate chains. Riggs AI evaluates findings against encryption policy requirements, flags non-compliant systems, and generates a compliance report. Systems using weak or deprecated ciphers are prioritized for immediate remediation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Qualys
required_integrations.reason: Scan systems for encryption configuration and certificate compliance

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for encryption compliance failures

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify security and infrastructure teams of encryption findings

config.description: Triggers monthly encryption compliance audit across all sensitive data systems

config.query: SELECT system_name, storage_type, encryption_enabled, encryption_algorithm, key_length, key_rotation_date, data_classification FROM system_inventory WHERE data_classification IN ('confidential', 'restricted') ORDER BY system_name
config.description: Query all systems with sensitive data for encryption-at-rest configuration status
Scan all external and internal endpoints for TLS/SSL configuration, cipher strength, and certificate validity

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate encryption compliance across all systems. Flag: unencrypted sensitive data at rest, weak cipher suites (RC4, DES, 3DES), deprecated TLS versions (1.0, 1.1), expired or soon-to-expire certificates, missing key rotation. Score overall encryption posture.
config.description: AI-powered encryption compliance assessment against organizational policy
Routes based on whether critical encryption failures were found (unencrypted sensitive data or weak ciphers)
Create a P1 ticket for critical encryption compliance failures
Alert security and infrastructure teams of critical encryption failures

parameters.note: Monthly encryption audit complete. All systems meet encryption policy requirements. No critical findings. Overall score: {{analyze_1.encryption_score}}

config.description: Document clean encryption audit result for compliance records
Encryption compliance audit complete -- all systems evaluated and findings documented
